# GENERATED by tools/dm_generate_reform_registry.py. DO NOT EDIT.

dm_reform_start_top_liege_redirected_to_border_wars_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = top_liege_redirected_to_border_wars_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:top_liege_redirected_to_border_wars_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_top_liege_not_redirected_to_border_wars_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = top_liege_not_redirected_to_border_wars_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:top_liege_not_redirected_to_border_wars_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_candidate_score_merit_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		influence = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 1000
			}
		}
		treasury = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					value = realm_size
					multiply = 10
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = candidate_score_merit_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					has_title = title:h_china
					government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
					NOT = {
						is_movement_in_power = {
							MOVEMENT = conservative_movement
						}
					}
					can_pass_candidate_score_merit_law_trigger = yes
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_influence
				value = 1000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:candidate_score_merit_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:meritocracy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_influence value = scope:dm_reform_paid_influence }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

					has_title = title:h_china

					is_movement_in_power = {
						MOVEMENT = conservative_movement
					}

				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:meritocracy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_influence value = scope:dm_reform_paid_influence }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }

					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }

		}

		}

			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_0 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
					NOT = {
						has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story

				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }

						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer

						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}

dm_reform_start_celestial_army_liege_law_1_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_1 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					is_independent_ruler = yes
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_army_liege_law_1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_army_liege_law_2_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_2 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					is_independent_ruler = yes
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_army_liege_law_2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_army_liege_law_3_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }

	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_3 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt

					is_independent_ruler = yes

						NOT = {
							has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}

				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_army_liege_law_3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }

					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }

						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_army_vassal_law_0_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_vassal_law_0 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						liege = {
							OR = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_0
								has_realm_law = celestial_army_vassal_law_0
							}
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
						always = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_army_vassal_law_0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_army_vassal_law_1_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_vassal_law_1 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						liege = {
							OR = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_1
								has_realm_law = celestial_army_vassal_law_1
							}
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
						always = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_army_vassal_law_1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_army_vassal_law_2_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_vassal_law_2 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						liege = {
							OR = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_2
								has_realm_law = celestial_army_vassal_law_2
							}
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
						always = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_army_vassal_law_2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_army_vassal_law_3_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_vassal_law_3 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						liege = {
							OR = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_3
								has_realm_law = celestial_army_vassal_law_3
							}
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
						always = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_army_vassal_law_3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_bureaucracy_0_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_0 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						is_independent_ruler = no
						liege = {
							has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_0
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
						always = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_bureaucracy_0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:ritual }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:ritual_legitimacy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_bureaucracy_1_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_2
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_1 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_0
							is_independent_ruler = yes
						}
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_celestial_bureaucracy_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							is_independent_ruler = no
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_1
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
					can_pass_law_ca1_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_2
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_bureaucracy_1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:ritual }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:ritual_legitimacy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_bureaucracy_2_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_2 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_3
							}
							is_independent_ruler = yes
						}
						has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_1
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_celestial_bureaucracy_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							is_independent_ruler = no
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_2
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
					can_pass_law_ca2_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_bureaucracy_2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:ritual }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:ritual_legitimacy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_bureaucracy_3_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_3 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							is_independent_ruler = yes
						}
						has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_2
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_celestial_bureaucracy_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							is_independent_ruler = no
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
					can_pass_law_ca3_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_bureaucracy_3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:ritual }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:ritual_legitimacy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_retirement_law_0_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_retirement_law_0 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege = this
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
							NOT = {
								has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = province_border_law_1
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_retirement_law_0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:meritocracy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_retirement_law_1_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_retirement_law_1 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege = this
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
							NOT = {
								has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_retirement_law_1
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_retirement_law_1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:meritocracy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_retirement_law_2_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_retirement_law_2 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege = this
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
							NOT = {
								has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_retirement_law_2
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_retirement_law_2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:meritocracy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_retirement_law_3_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_retirement_law_3 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege = this
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
							NOT = {
								has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_retirement_law_3
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_retirement_law_3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:meritocracy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_retirement_law_4_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 30
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_retirement_law_4 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege = this
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
							NOT = {
								has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = celestial_retirement_law_4
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_retirement_law_4 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:meritocracy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_retirement_law_5_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_retirement_law_5 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						top_liege != this
						liege = {
							has_realm_law = celestial_retirement_law_5
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
						always = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_retirement_law_5 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:meritocracy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_crown_authority_legacy_head_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_legacy_head }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = tt_cannot_actively_lower_crown_authority_to_this_level
					always = no
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:crown_authority_legacy_head }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_crown_authority_titular_liege_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_0
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_1
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_2
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
						if = {
							limit = {
								NOT = {
									any_tributary = {
										count <= 0
									}
								}
							}
							add = {
								every_tributary = {
									limit = {
										has_subject_contract_group = feudal_autonomous_vassal
									}
									add = 100
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_titular_liege }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_0
							}
							NAND = {
								government_allows = administrative
								top_liege != this
							}
						}
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_crown_authority_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = crown_authority_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
						trigger_if = {
							limit = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_legacy_head
							}
							has_realm_law = crown_authority_legacy_head
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = tt_cannot_actively_lower_crown_authority_to_this_level
						has_realm_law = crown_authority_legacy_head
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_0
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_1
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_2
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
						if = {
							limit = {
								NOT = {
									any_tributary = {
										count <= 0
									}
								}
							}
							add = {
								every_tributary = {
									limit = {
										has_subject_contract_group = feudal_autonomous_vassal
									}
									add = 100
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:crown_authority_titular_liege }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_crown_authority_0_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_1
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_2
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
						if = {
							limit = {
								NOT = {
									any_tributary = {
										count <= 0
									}
								}
							}
							add = {
								every_tributary = {
									limit = {
										has_subject_contract_group = feudal_autonomous_vassal
									}
									add = 100
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_0 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = {
							has_realm_law = crown_authority_1
						}
						NAND = {
							government_allows = administrative
							top_liege != this
						}
					}
					custom_description = {
						subject = scope:actor
						text = "has_crown_authority_cooldown"
						NAND = {
							has_variable = crown_authority_cooldown
							NOT = {
								culture = {
									has_innovation = innovation_all_things
								}
							}
						}
					}
					has_realm_law = crown_authority_titular_liege
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = tt_cannot_have_diarch
						NOT = {
							exists = diarch
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_1
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_2
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
						if = {
							limit = {
								NOT = {
									any_tributary = {
										count <= 0
									}
								}
							}
							add = {
								every_tributary = {
									limit = {
										has_subject_contract_group = feudal_autonomous_vassal
									}
									add = 100
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:crown_authority_0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_crown_authority_1_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_2
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_1 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_2
							}
							NAND = {
								government_allows = administrative
								top_liege != this
							}
						}
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_crown_authority_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = crown_authority_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
						has_realm_law = crown_authority_0
					}
					can_pass_law_ca1_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_2
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:crown_authority_1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_crown_authority_2_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 30
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_2 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_3
							}
							NAND = {
								government_allows = administrative
								top_liege != this
							}
						}
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_crown_authority_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = crown_authority_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
						has_realm_law = crown_authority_1
					}
					can_pass_law_ca2_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:crown_authority_2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_crown_authority_3_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_3 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							NAND = {
								government_allows = administrative
								top_liege != this
							}
						}
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_crown_authority_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = crown_authority_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
						has_realm_law = crown_authority_2
					}
					can_pass_law_ca3_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = crown_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:crown_authority_3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_feudal_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 80
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government } }
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_feudal_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
