			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = feudal_government
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_feudal_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_republic_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 40
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		modifier = { add = 40 scope:actor = { stewardship >= 20 } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_trait = greedy } }
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_government_reform_risk_warning
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_republic_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = republic_government
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_republic_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_theocracy_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 40
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
		modifier = { add = 40 scope:actor = { learning >= 20 } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_trait = zealous } }
		modifier = { add = -30 scope:actor = { has_trait = cynical } }
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_government_reform_risk_warning
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_theocracy_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = theocracy_government
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_theocracy_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_clan_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 80
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government } }
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_clan_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = clan_government
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_clan_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_tribal_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 60
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government } }
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_tribal_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = tribal_government
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_tribal_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_wanua_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 60
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government } }
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_wanua_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = wanua_government
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_wanua_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_administrative_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 160
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government } }
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_administrative_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = administrative_government
					}
					custom_description = {
						text = dm_government_reform_requires_ep3_tt
						has_ep3_dlc_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_administrative_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_feudal_admin_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 140
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government } }
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_feudal_admin_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = feudal_admin_government
					}
					custom_description = {
						text = dm_government_reform_requires_ep3_tt
						has_ep3_dlc_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_feudal_admin_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_celestial_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 160
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government } }
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_celestial_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = celestial_government
					}
					custom_description = {
						text = dm_government_reform_requires_tgp_tt
						has_tgp_dlc_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_celestial_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_mandala_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 100
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_mandala_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = mandala_government
					}
					custom_description = {
						text = dm_government_reform_requires_tgp_tt
						has_tgp_dlc_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_mandala_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_meritocratic_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 120
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government } }
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_meritocratic_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = meritocratic_government
					}
					custom_description = {
						text = dm_government_reform_requires_tgp_tt
						has_tgp_dlc_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_meritocratic_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_japan_administrative_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 160
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government } }
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
