			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_japan_administrative_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = japan_administrative_government
					}
					custom_description = {
						text = dm_government_reform_requires_tgp_tt
						has_tgp_dlc_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_japan_administrative_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_japan_feudal_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 80
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government } }
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_japan_feudal_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = japan_feudal_government
					}
					custom_description = {
						text = dm_government_reform_requires_tgp_tt
						has_tgp_dlc_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_japan_feudal_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_nomad_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 40
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_nomad_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = nomad_government
					}
					custom_description = {
						text = dm_government_reform_requires_mpo_tt
						has_mpo_dlc_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_nomad_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_dm_government_reform_steppe_admin_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 140
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government } }
		modifier = { add = 30 scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government } }
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = republic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = theocracy_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = clan_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = tribal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 40
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = wanua_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = feudal_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = celestial_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = mandala_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = meritocratic_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -60
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 15
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_administrative_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 20
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = japan_feudal_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 60
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 25
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = ambitious }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -30
			scope:actor = { has_government = nomad_government has_trait = content }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = -40
			scope:actor = { has_government = steppe_admin_government }
		}
		modifier = { add = 15 scope:actor = { has_trait = diligent } }
		modifier = { add = -25 scope:actor = { has_trait = stubborn } }
		modifier = { add = 10 scope:actor = { has_trait = brave } }
		modifier = { add = -15 scope:actor = { has_trait = craven } }
		modifier = { add = -100 scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes } }
		modifier = { add = -40 scope:actor = { is_at_war = yes } }
		modifier = {
			add = -80
			scope:actor = {
				any_character_war = {
					is_war_leader = root
					OR = {
						AND = { primary_attacker = root attacker_war_score < -50 }
						AND = { primary_defender = root defender_war_score < -50 }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 2000
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_steppe_admin_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = { is_ai = yes }
				prestige >= 4000
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = { has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown }
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					dm_can_change_government_reform_law_group_trigger = yes
					is_landed = yes
					NOT = {
						has_government = steppe_admin_government
					}
					custom_description = {
						text = dm_government_reform_requires_tgp_tt
						has_tgp_dlc_trigger = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 2000
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:dm_government_reform_steppe_admin_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_grand_chancellor_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = grand_chancellor_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					has_title = title:h_china
					government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
					exists = title:e_minister_chancellor.holder
					OR = {
						situation:dynastic_cycle ?= {
							situation_current_phase = situation_dynastic_cycle_phase_stability_advancement
						}
						is_movement_in_power = {
							MOVEMENT = advancement_movement
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:grand_chancellor_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_grand_marshal_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 20
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = grand_marshal_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					has_title = title:h_china
					government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
					exists = title:e_minister_grand_marshal.holder
					situation:dynastic_cycle ?= {
						NOR = {
							situation_current_phase = situation_dynastic_cycle_phase_stability_advancement
							situation_current_phase = situation_dynastic_cycle_phase_instability
						}
						situation_participant_group:expansion_movement ?= {
							save_temporary_scope_as = my_movement
							custom_tooltip = {
								text = my_movement_is_not_in_power
								exists = var:movement_favored
							}
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:grand_marshal_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_grand_censor_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = grand_censor_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					has_title = title:h_china
					government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
					exists = title:e_minister_censor.holder
					situation:dynastic_cycle ?= {
						NOR = {
							situation_current_phase = situation_dynastic_cycle_phase_stability_expansion
							situation_current_phase = situation_dynastic_cycle_phase_stability_advancement
						}
					}
					situation:dynastic_cycle.situation_participant_group:conservative_movement ?= {
						save_temporary_scope_as = my_movement
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = my_movement_is_not_in_power
							exists = var:movement_favored
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:grand_censor_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_imperial_bureaucracy_0_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_0 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						top_liege != this
						liege = {
							has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_0
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
						always = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:imperial_bureaucracy_0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_imperial_bureaucracy_1_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_2
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_1 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_0
							top_liege = this
						}
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_1
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
					can_pass_law_ca1_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_2
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:imperial_bureaucracy_1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_imperial_bureaucracy_2_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_2 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_3
							}
							top_liege = this
						}
						has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_1
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_2
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
					can_pass_law_ca2_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:imperial_bureaucracy_2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_imperial_bureaucracy_3_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_3 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege = this
						}
						has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_2
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
					can_pass_law_ca3_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = imperial_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:imperial_bureaucracy_3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_defense_mobilization_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 500
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = defense_mobilization_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						top_liege = this
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown
						}
					}
					dm_reform_japan_defense_mobilization_valid_trigger = {
						CHARACTER = scope:actor
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 500
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:defense_mobilization_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_disarmament_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 500
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = disarmament_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						top_liege = this
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 500
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:disarmament_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_isolation_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 500
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = isolation_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						top_liege = this
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 500
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:isolation_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_imperial_expansion_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 500
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = imperial_expansion_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						top_liege = this
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_2
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_2
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_2
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3
					}
					is_at_war = no
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 500
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:imperial_expansion_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_manor_reform_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 30
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 500
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = manor_reform_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						top_liege = this
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 500
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:manor_reform_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_bandit_crackdown_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = 500
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = bandit_crackdown_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						top_liege = this
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = imperial_policy_laws_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = 500
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:bandit_crackdown_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:authority }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:centralization }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_japanese_bureaucracy_0_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_0 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						is_independent_ruler = no
						liege = {
							has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_0
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
						always = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:japanese_bureaucracy_0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_japanese_bureaucracy_1_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_2
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_1 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_0
							is_independent_ruler = yes
						}
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_japanese_bureaucracy_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							is_independent_ruler = no
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_1
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
					can_pass_law_ca1_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_2
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:japanese_bureaucracy_1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_japanese_bureaucracy_2_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_2 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3
							}
							is_independent_ruler = yes
						}
						has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_1
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_japanese_bureaucracy_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							is_independent_ruler = no
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_2
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
					can_pass_law_ca2_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:japanese_bureaucracy_2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_japanese_bureaucracy_3_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							is_independent_ruler = yes
						}
						has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_2
						custom_description = {
							subject = scope:actor
							text = "has_japanese_bureaucracy_cooldown"
							NAND = {
								has_variable = imperial_bureaucracy_cooldown
								NOT = {
									culture = {
										has_innovation = innovation_all_things
									}
								}
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							is_independent_ruler = no
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
					can_pass_law_ca3_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = japanese_bureaucracy_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_crown_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:japanese_bureaucracy_3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_law_candidate_preference_policy_powerful_gentry_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = law_candidate_preference_policy_powerful_gentry }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					OR = {
						government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
						government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
					}
					highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
					any_vassal = {
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:law_candidate_preference_policy_powerful_gentry }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:meritocracy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_law_candidate_preference_policy_local_talent_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = law_candidate_preference_policy_local_talent }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					OR = {
						government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
						government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
					}
					highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
					any_vassal = {
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
						NOT = {
							has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_local_talent
							}
						}
						most_vassals_have_local_talent_or_above = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:law_candidate_preference_policy_local_talent }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:meritocracy }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
