								has_realm_law = province_border_law_1
							}
							NOR = {
								government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
								government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:province_border_law_1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_province_border_law_2_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = province_border_law_2 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege = this
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
							NOT = {
								has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = province_border_law_2
							}
							NOR = {
								government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
								government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:province_border_law_2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:administration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:administrative_unity }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_province_war_law_0_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = province_war_law_0 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						top_liege != this
						liege = {
							has_realm_law = province_war_law_0
						}
					}
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
						always = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:province_war_law_0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_province_war_law_1_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = province_war_law_1 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege = this
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
							NOT = {
								has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = province_war_law_1
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:province_war_law_1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_province_war_law_2_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = province_war_law_2 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege = this
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
							NOT = {
								has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = province_war_law_2
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:province_war_law_2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_province_war_law_3_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = province_war_law_3 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege = this
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = admin_law_cooldown_desc
							NOT = {
								has_variable = admin_law_cooldown
							}
						}
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							top_liege != this
							liege = {
								has_realm_law = province_war_law_3
							}
						}
						custom_tooltip = {
							text = imperial_bureaucracy_pending_law_change
							always = no
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					add = admin_law_prestige_cost
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:province_war_law_3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:military }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:military_control }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_saas_no_stipend_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = medium_prestige_value
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = saas_no_stipend_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					is_landed = yes
					highest_held_title_tier >= tier_county
					NOT = {
						has_variable = saas_stipend_law_cooldown
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = medium_prestige_value
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:saas_no_stipend_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:finance }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:court_expenditure }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_saas_limited_stipend_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = medium_prestige_value
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = saas_limited_stipend_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					is_landed = yes
					highest_held_title_tier >= tier_county
					NOT = {
						has_variable = saas_stipend_law_cooldown
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = medium_prestige_value
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:saas_limited_stipend_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:finance }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:court_expenditure }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_saas_normal_stipend_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 20
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = medium_prestige_value
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = saas_normal_stipend_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					is_landed = yes
					highest_held_title_tier >= tier_county
					NOT = {
						has_variable = saas_stipend_law_cooldown
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = medium_prestige_value
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:saas_normal_stipend_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:finance }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:court_expenditure }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_saas_large_stipend_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 30
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = medium_prestige_value
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = saas_large_stipend_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					is_landed = yes
					highest_held_title_tier >= tier_county
					NOT = {
						has_variable = saas_stipend_law_cooldown
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = medium_prestige_value
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:saas_large_stipend_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:finance }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:court_expenditure }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_saas_double_stipend_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = medium_prestige_value
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = saas_double_stipend_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					is_landed = yes
					highest_held_title_tier >= tier_county
					NOT = {
						has_variable = saas_stipend_law_cooldown
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = medium_prestige_value
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:saas_double_stipend_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:finance }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:court_expenditure }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_male_only_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = male_only_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				can_change_succession_law_trigger = yes
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:male_only_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_male_preference_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = male_preference_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				can_change_succession_law_trigger = yes
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {

			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:male_preference_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }

					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_equal_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 20
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = equal_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				can_change_succession_law_trigger = yes
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:equal_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 30
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = female_preference_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}

			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes

				can_change_succession_law_trigger = yes

				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}

			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:female_preference_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
