				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_female_only_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = female_only_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				can_change_succession_law_trigger = yes
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:female_only_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_confederate_partition_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = confederate_partition_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			NOR = {
				government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
				government_has_flag = government_is_clan
				government_has_flag = government_is_administrative
				government_has_flag = government_is_mandala
				government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
				government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic
				government_has_flag = government_is_steppe_admin
				has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
				subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					can_have_confederate_partition_succession_law_trigger = yes
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							exists = primary_title
						}
						is_confederation_member = no
					}
					can_change_partition_succession_law_trigger = yes
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							exists = primary_title
						}
						is_confederation_member = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:confederate_partition_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_partition_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = partition_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			NOR = {
				government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
				government_has_flag = government_is_clan
				government_has_flag = government_is_administrative
				government_has_flag = government_is_mandala
				government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
				government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic
				government_has_flag = government_is_steppe_admin
				has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
				subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					OR = {
						can_have_partition_succession_law_trigger = yes
						trigger_if = {
							limit = {
								exists = primary_title
							}
							is_confederation_member = yes
						}
					}
					OR = {
						can_change_partition_succession_law_trigger = yes
						trigger_if = {
							limit = {
								exists = primary_title
							}
							is_confederation_member = yes
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:partition_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_high_partition_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = high_partition_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			NOR = {
				government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
				government_has_flag = government_is_clan
				government_has_flag = government_is_administrative
				government_has_flag = government_is_mandala
				government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
				government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic
				government_has_flag = government_is_steppe_admin
				has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
				subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					NOT = {
						government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
					}
					can_have_high_partition_succession_law_trigger = yes
					can_change_partition_succession_law_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:high_partition_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_single_heir_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
		piety = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					value = 0
					if = {
						limit = {
							government_has_flag = government_is_clan
						}
						add = {
							value = 1500
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = single_heir_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			NOR = {
				government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
				government_has_flag = government_is_mandala
				has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
				subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
			}
			trigger_if = {
				limit = {
					government_allows = administrative
				}
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
					is_independent_ruler = yes
					tgp_is_ceremonial_liege_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					NOT = {
						government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
					}
					can_have_single_heir_succession_law_trigger = yes
					can_change_succession_law_trigger = yes
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							government_has_flag = government_is_clan
						}
						piety_level >= 3
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							government_allows = administrative
						}
						OR = {
							government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
							AND = {
								influence_level >= 4
								has_active_diarchy = no
								primary_title = {
									title_held_years >= 10
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_piety
				value = {
					value = 0
					if = {
						limit = {
							government_has_flag = government_is_clan
						}
						add = {
							value = 1500
						}
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:single_heir_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_piety value = scope:dm_reform_paid_piety }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_single_heir_succession_kurultai_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = single_heir_succession_kurultai_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
					government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:single_heir_succession_kurultai_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_single_heir_succession_law_youngest_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
		piety = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					value = 0
					if = {
						limit = {
							government_has_flag = government_is_clan
						}
						add = {
							value = 1500
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = single_heir_succession_law_youngest }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			trigger_if = {
				limit = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_administrative
				}
				is_independent_ruler = yes
			}
			NOR = {
				government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
				government_has_flag = government_is_mandala
				has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
				subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					NOT = {
						government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
					}
					can_have_single_heir_youngest_succession_law_trigger = yes
					can_change_succession_law_trigger = yes
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							government_has_flag = government_is_clan
						}
						piety_level >= 3
					}
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							government_allows = administrative
						}
						OR = {
							government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
							AND = {
								influence_level >= 4
								has_active_diarchy = no
								primary_title = {
									title_held_years >= 10
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_piety
				value = {
					value = 0
					if = {
						limit = {
							government_has_flag = government_is_clan
						}
						add = {
							value = 1500
						}
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:single_heir_succession_law_youngest }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_piety value = scope:dm_reform_paid_piety }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_single_heir_dynasty_house_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
		piety = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					value = 0
					if = {
						limit = {
							government_has_flag = government_is_clan
						}
						add = {
							value = 1500
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = single_heir_dynasty_house }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			NOR = {
				government_has_flag = government_is_administrative
				government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
				government_has_flag = government_is_mandala
				has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
				subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					NOT = {
						government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
					}
					can_have_single_heir_dynasty_house_trigger = yes
					can_change_single_heir_dynasty_house_succession_law_trigger = yes
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							government_has_flag = government_is_clan
						}
						piety_level >= 3
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_piety
				value = {
					value = 0
					if = {
						limit = {
							government_has_flag = government_is_clan
						}
						add = {
							value = 1500
						}
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:single_heir_dynasty_house }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_piety value = scope:dm_reform_paid_piety }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_acclamation_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 10
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
					multiply = {
						value = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = acclamation_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_allows = administrative
			is_independent_ruler = yes
			NOR = {
				government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
				government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
				government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
				government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic
				government_has_flag = government_is_steppe_admin
			}
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					NOT = {
						government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
					}
					can_have_acclamation_succession_law_trigger = yes
					can_change_acclamation_succession_law_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
					multiply = {
						value = 0.5
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:acclamation_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_appointment_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = appointment_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_allows = administrative
			NOR = {
				government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
				government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
				government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
				government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic
				has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
			}
			is_independent_ruler = no
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					NOT = {
						government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
					}
					can_have_appointment_succession_law_trigger = yes
					can_change_appointment_succession_law_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:appointment_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_landless_adventurer_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = landless_adventurer_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_landless_adventurer
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_landless_adventurer
					government_has_flag = government_is_landless_adventurer
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:landless_adventurer_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_bishop_theocratic_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = bishop_theocratic_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			can_have_bishop_theocratic_succession_law_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					can_have_bishop_theocratic_succession_law_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:bishop_theocratic_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_holy_order_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = holy_order_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			can_have_holy_order_succession_law_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					can_have_holy_order_succession_law_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:holy_order_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_mercenary_company_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = mercenary_company_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			can_have_mercenary_succession_law_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					can_have_mercenary_succession_law_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:mercenary_company_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_city_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 20
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = city_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			can_have_city_succession_law_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					can_have_city_succession_law_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:city_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_clan_antagonistic_partition_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 20
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = clan_antagonistic_partition_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_clan
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_clan
					house ?= {
						has_house_unity_stage = antagonistic
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_clan
					house ?= {
						has_house_unity_stage = antagonistic
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:clan_antagonistic_partition_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_clan_competitive_partition_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 20
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = clan_competitive_partition_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_clan
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_clan
					house ?= {
						has_house_unity_stage = competitive
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_clan
					house ?= {
						has_house_unity_stage = competitive
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:clan_competitive_partition_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_clan_impassive_partition_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 20
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = clan_impassive_partition_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_clan
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_clan
					house ?= {
						has_house_unity_stage = impassive
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_clan
					house ?= {
						has_house_unity_stage = impassive
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:clan_impassive_partition_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_clan_friendly_partition_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 20
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = clan_friendly_partition_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_clan
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_clan
					house ?= {
						has_house_unity_stage = friendly
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_clan
					house ?= {
						has_house_unity_stage = friendly
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:clan_friendly_partition_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 0 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_clan_harmonious_partition_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = clan_harmonious_partition_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_clan
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_clan
					house ?= {
						has_house_unity_stage = harmonious
					}
					government_has_flag = government_is_clan
					house ?= {
						has_house_unity_stage = harmonious
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:clan_harmonious_partition_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_herder_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = herder_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			can_have_herder_succession_law_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					can_have_herder_succession_law_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:herder_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_appointment_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_appointment_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
			is_independent_ruler = no
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					government_allows = administrative
					is_independent_ruler = no
					government_allows = administrative
					is_independent_ruler = no
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_appointment_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_celestial_military_appointment_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_military_appointment_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
			is_independent_ruler = no
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					government_allows = administrative
					is_independent_ruler = no
					can_change_succession_law_trigger = yes
					government_allows = administrative
					is_independent_ruler = no
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:celestial_military_appointment_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_japanese_regency_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = japanese_regency_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					can_have_japanese_regency_succession_law_trigger = yes
					can_have_japanese_regency_succession_law_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:japanese_regency_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_japanese_appointment_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 30
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = japanese_appointment_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
			is_independent_ruler = no
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					can_have_japanese_appointment_succession_law_trigger = yes
					can_change_japanese_appointment_succession_law_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:japanese_appointment_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 30
		modifier = {
			factor = 0

		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }

	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0

				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {

			is_ruler = yes

			government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
			is_independent_ruler = no
		}
	}

				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt

						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP

							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion

					}
					government_allows = administrative
					is_independent_ruler = no
					can_change_succession_law_trigger = yes
					government_allows = administrative
					is_independent_ruler = no

			}
		}
	}

				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
