				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:japanese_military_appointment_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_mandala_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 30
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			realm_law_is_mandala = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					realm_law_is_mandala = yes
					realm_law_is_mandala = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:mandala_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 2 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_meritocratic_appointment_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 30
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_appointment_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic
			is_independent_ruler = no
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					government_allows = administrative
					is_independent_ruler = no
					government_allows = administrative
					is_independent_ruler = no
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:meritocratic_appointment_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_meritocratic_military_appointment_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 30
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_military_appointment_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic
			is_independent_ruler = no
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					government_allows = administrative
					is_independent_ruler = no
					government_allows = administrative
					is_independent_ruler = no
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:meritocratic_military_appointment_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_meritocratic_regency_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_regency_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			government_allows = administrative
			government_allows = merit
			tgp_realm_has_ceremonial_liege_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					custom_tooltip = {
						text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
						NOR = {
							has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
							government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
							subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
							subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
						}
					}
					can_have_meritocratic_regency_succession_law_trigger = yes
					can_have_meritocratic_regency_succession_law_trigger = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = change_succession_law_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:meritocratic_regency_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			is_independent_ruler = no
			OR = {
				government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
				government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
			}
			subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {
						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
						subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			is_independent_ruler = no
			OR = {
				government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
				government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
			}
			subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
			subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {
						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
						subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:succession }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:succession_concentration }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_tribal_authority_0_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 5
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_0 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:tribal_authority_0 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:tribal_nomadic }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:state_settlement }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -3 }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_tribal_authority_1_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 15
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = tribal_authority_2
								has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_tribal_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_1 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						has_realm_law = tribal_authority_0
					}
					custom_description = {
						subject = scope:actor
						text = "has_tribal_authority_cooldown"
						NAND = {
							has_variable = tribal_authority_cooldown
							NOT = {
								culture = {
									has_innovation = innovation_all_things
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOR = {
								has_realm_law = tribal_authority_2
								has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_tribal_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:tribal_authority_1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:tribal_nomadic }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:state_settlement }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = -1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_tribal_authority_2_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 25
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_tribal_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_2 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						NOT = {
							has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3
						}
					}
					has_realm_law = tribal_authority_1
					custom_description = {
						subject = scope:actor
						text = "has_tribal_authority_cooldown"
						NAND = {
							has_variable = tribal_authority_cooldown
							NOT = {
								culture = {
									has_innovation = innovation_all_things
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = {
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3
							}
						}
						add = increase_tribal_authority_prestige_cost
					}
				}
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:tribal_authority_2 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:tribal_nomadic }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:state_settlement }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 1 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_start_tribal_authority_3_interaction = {
	category = interaction_category_friendly
	common_interaction = yes
	hidden = yes
	popup_on_receive = no
	ai_maybe = yes
	ai_frequency = 36
	ai_accept = { base = 100 }
	ai_will_do = {
		base = 35
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			scope:actor = { is_in_debt = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 1.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = ambitious has_trait = diligent } }
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0.5
			scope:actor = { OR = { has_trait = content has_trait = lazy } }
		}
	}
	ai_targets = { ai_recipients = self }
	desc = dm_reform_start_interaction_desc
	icon = scroll_scales
	cost = {
		prestige = {
			value = 0
			scope:actor = {
				add = increase_tribal_authority_prestige_cost
			}
		}
	}
	is_shown = {
		scope:recipient = scope:actor
		scope:actor = {
			is_ruler = yes
			NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3 }
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
		}
	}
	is_valid_showing_failures_only = {
		scope:actor = {
			dm_reform_can_start_trigger = yes
			custom_description = {
				text = dm_reform_law_requirements_tt
				AND = {
					has_realm_law = tribal_authority_2
					custom_description = {
						subject = scope:actor
						text = "has_tribal_authority_cooldown"
						NAND = {
							has_variable = tribal_authority_cooldown
							NOT = {
								culture = {
									has_innovation = innovation_all_things
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
	on_accept = {
		scope:actor = {
			save_scope_value_as = {
				name = dm_reform_paid_prestige
				value = increase_tribal_authority_prestige_cost
			}
			create_story = dm_reform_story
			random_owned_story = {
				limit = { story_type = dm_reform_story }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target value = flag:tribal_authority_3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_theme value = flag:tribal_nomadic }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_axis value = flag:state_settlement }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_target_level value = 3 }
				set_variable = { name = dm_reform_paid_prestige value = scope:dm_reform_paid_prestige }
				dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = yes
				if = {
					limit = { story_owner = { has_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer } }
					set_variable = {
						name = dm_reform_pending_reformer
						value = story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer
					}
					save_scope_as = dm_reform_story
					story_owner.var:dm_reform_pending_reformer = {
						trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0210 days = 1 }
					}
					story_owner = { remove_variable = dm_reform_pending_reformer }
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = dm_reform.0001 days = 1 }
		}
	}
}
